allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('better-sqlite3'\)\(':memory:'\); console.log\('better-sqlite3 OK, version:', db.pragma\('user_version', {simple:true}\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Services loaded:', j.data.services.length, 'First:', j.data.services[0].name\);")
Bash(git commit -m 'Initial commit: Jb Pest Control full-stack website *)

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Services on Heroku:', j.data.services.length\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Login:', j.success ? 'OK - token received' : 'FAILED: ' + j.error\);}\)")
